Understanding Transformers

Transformers are a deep learning architecture introduced in the paper Attention Is All You Need (Vaswani et al., 2017). They have become the foundation of modern large language models.

Self-Attention

The key innovation is self-attention: each token in the input sequence can attend to every other token, capturing long-range dependencies without recurrence.

Applications

  • Natural language processing
  • Image recognition (ViT)
  • Code generation

For more details, see the original paper.
